title: 22mm Snap On Pipe Clip White Plastic Pipe Support Bracket Pack of 50 for Securing & Supporting Pipework Job tasks
features: Snap-on 22mm pipe clip suitable for standard copper, plastic, or barrier pipe, providing secure support for pipe runs.
Quick-fit design allows fast installation and easy removal without tools, saving time on plumbing tasks.
Made from durable white plastic, ideal for everyday domestic, commercial, or DIY plumbing work.
Keeps pipework neat, evenly spaced, and firmly held along walls, joists, or other surfaces.
Supplied in a pack of 50, giving ample clips for multiple installations or larger plumbing projects.
description: " This 22mm snap on pipe clip is designed for securing and supporting 22mm pipe runs on walls, joists, and other surfaces. It provides a firm hold while allowing quick installation. • Fits standard 22mm copper, plastic, and barrier pipe • Snap on design for quick fitting and removal • Strong white plastic suitable for everyday plumbing work • Keeps pipework neat, supported, and evenly spaced • Suitable for heating, hot and cold water, and general plumbing • Pack of 50 A practical clip for keeping 22mm pipework secure and tidy during installation or maintenance. "
